concept.title: Execution Phase
concept.shortdesc: Execution dispatches plan actions to registered handlers and records per-action outcomes in an execution report.

ul.li: Dry-run mode (default): validates dispatch and records skipped outcomes without filesystem mutation.
Apply mode (--apply): runs handlers against explicit source and target roots and records success or failure for each action.
Dispatcher iterates ordered actions and captures started and finished timestamps.
Execution registry resolves handlers by action_type.
Handlers validate parameters, enforce sandbox and policy rules, and return ExecutionActionResult.

section.title: Failure model
section.p: Failures are explicit and typed. Reports can include handler_error, policy_violation, or executor_error. Use action_id to map failures back to plan intent.
